arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Sunderland vs. Hull City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Sunderland vs. Hull City.

arts.ttl: What Ruben Selles said on the relegation scrap ahead of Hull City's trip to Sunderland
arts.sum: Being in the bottom echelons of the league adds a very different pressure to challenging at the top of the league, especially when you know what relegation can mean for those away from the playing side of the club, and for a club like City, who have invested heavily to try and chase the Premier League dream. We accept the situation that is going to be in and around us until the end of the season, and that's the first thing," the Spaniard tells Hull Live in a discussion about working under the very real threat of what would be a disastrous relegation.

arts.ttl: Hull City must prove Sheffield United display wasn't a flash in the pan
arts.sum: Like the Blades were, Sunderland is unbeaten at home in the Championship this season with 10 wins and six draws from their 16 Stadium of Light encounters - you can feel every Tigers fan reading that line with sheer envy, wondering what such form must be like to enjoy in their own stadium. Hull City's stunning 3-0 win at Sheffield United last month captured the imagination of fans and pundits alike as Ruben Selles' outfit swept aside the Blades in mesmerising fashion.

arts.ttl: Sunderland ace fires warning ahead of Hull City Championship showdown
arts.sum: We know we're a good team, we're good players, so we want to win games like that where, where we've got chances. Our remaining games are, like I said, cup finals," Neil said .

arts.ttl: Hull City ace makes relegation threat admission but confidence drawn from key aspect
arts.sum: Unfortunately, those performances and results have not come consistently enough this term, and it's why City find themselves in a perilous situation, one Alzate believes the players can get out of in what he describes as fourteen cup finals between now and the end of the campaign. Hopefully, we will have a good game like we have been doing recently and pick up a result.

arts.ttl: Trafford on Burnley's clean-sheet run, JJ Watt wager and Sunderland pen saves
arts.sum: Confidence oozes from James Trafford as he speaks, but was he expecting things to be quite so good for him at Burnley this season?

arts.ttl: Hull City attacker returns to training after long-term injury absence
arts.sum: Hull City winger Dogukan Sinik has returned to training, as detailed in a report by HullLive. Hull City… The post Hull City attacker returns to training after long-term injury absence appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City handed double boost for Sunderland as absentee list shrinks for Ruben Selles
arts.sum: Manchester City loanee Burns has missed the last three games with a calf injury, while Hughes has not played since the win over Swansea City before Christmas, but the duo have been in training this week and providing they come through Friday’s pre-game session ahead of the journey up to the North East, could be in the squad at the Stadium of Light . Hull City could be boosted by Charlie Hughes and Fin Burns returning for the trip to Sunderland on Saturday as they look to secure a first win since beating Sheffield United last month.
